papers.reason: Reality Mining is a high-citation social sensing precedent for Beat 5 platform/data-collection design.

LIMA is a quality-over-quantity fine-tuning anchor for Beat 4 data composition.
FineWeb is a web-scale corpus quality and curation anchor for Beat 2.

The C4 documentation paper is a direct web-corpus composition / quality measurement anchor.
Wikipedia AI-content rise is a direct online-content prevalence / temporal-change anchor.
Self-Instruct is a foundational synthetic-instruction-data composition anchor for alignment fine-tuning.

OpenAssistant Conversations is a human / open alignment-data anchor for fine-tuning composition.

The Curse of Recursion is a flagged missing cornerstone collapse paper for Beat 1.
A Watermark for Large Language Models is a flagged missing provenance baseline for Beat 1/2.

_note: Manual core inclusion layer: force high-value bridge papers into corpus_200 when retrieval found them but heuristic scoring would otherwise drop or miscategorize them.
